publishedAbstract: * MON pods are full of `handle_auth_bad_method` while deploying OpenShift Container Storage 4.X on Baremetal. ~~~ debug 2020-04-20 19:56:53.066 7f770d973700-1 mon.d@0(probing) e0 handle_auth_bad_method hmm, they didn't like 2 result (13) Permission denied ~~~ * MON pods are full of `cephx: verify_authorizer could not decrypt ticket info`: ~~~ debug 2020-04-20 19:58:08.447 7f1b2691a700 0 cephx: verify_authorizer could not decrypt ticket info: error: bad magic in decode_decrypt, 10178005500464711883!= 18374858748799134293 ~~~ * Three mons are deployed but do not form a quorum.
publishedTitle: MON pods are full of 'handle_auth_bad_method' while deploying OpenShift Container Storage 4.X on Baremetal.
